property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;D:\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\muhamed.gamal\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\muhamed.gamal\AppData\Local\Programs\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.2.6\bin;C:\Users\muhamed.gamal\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;;.

testcase.name: ValidChannel_Format
SendRequestWithoutCampaign
testcase.system-out:
